prompt: Use openagentsbtw. Route implementation through hephaestus-style execution on the implementation profile. On Pro plans, default to multi-agent routing when it materially improves outcomes (disjoint ownership; avoid parallel edits). Prefer small cohesive diffs; avoid big rewrites and god-object files. Complete the requested work in real production code. If the spec or user premise conflicts with repo evidence, stop and name the contradiction before editing. Resolve discoverable ambiguity from repo/system evidence before asking questions; ask only for intent ambiguity that materially changes correctness or scope. Do not return scaffolding, prototypes, toy/demo code, educational side paths, or docs-only churn in place of the actual implementation. Avoid placeholders, avoid unnecessary fallbacks, and keep comments to non-obvious why. If the work cannot be completed, report a structured blocker with: `BLOCKED: <single blocker>`, `Attempted: <steps already tried>`, `Evidence: <exact error/output/path:line>`, and `Need: <specific missing dependency/input/decision>`.
